info.title: 2024-Divvy-Trip-Data-Monthly
info.subtitle: Complete, raw Divvy trip data from each month in 2024
info.description:
This dataset contains one complete data file for each full month of 2024.
The full dataset is available at: https://divvy-tripdata.s3.amazonaws.com/index.html
This dataset is referenced in the **Case Study 1** from the **Google Data Analysis Professional Certificate**.
info.userSpecifiedSources: Source data downloaded from the following page provided in the Cyclistic Bike-Share Case Study (Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate via Coursera): https://divvy-tripdata.s3.amazonaws.com/index.html
